features.pinned: Popular tools are pinned at the top

meta_length.name: SEO Meta Tag Character Counter
meta_length.description: Ensure Google doesn't cut off your title and description. Check optimal character count in real-time.

serp_preview.name: Google Search Result Preview
serp_preview.description: See how your site appears in Google search results. Preview from your customer's perspective and boost click-through rates.

og_preview.name: Social Share (OG) Card Preview
og_preview.description: Is your image broken when sharing links on KakaoTalk or Slack? Test how your link will look before sharing.

robots_sitemap.name: robots.txt & Sitemap Generator
robots_sitemap.description: Create a guide for Google search robots in just 10 seconds. Essential SEO foundation!

background_remover.name: AI Image Background Remover
background_remover.description: Remove backgrounds in 5 seconds without Photoshop! Keep what you want and make the background transparent.

pdf_rotate.name: PDF Page Editor
pdf_rotate.description: Fix upside-down scanned pages and delete unnecessary pages. No software installation needed!

korean_proofread.name: AI Sentence Proofreader
korean_proofread.description: Fix awkward sentences, typos, and spacing. Let AI polish your writing to professional standards.

text_metrics.name: Character Count & Spell Checker
text_metrics.description: Stop stressing about character limits for essays and reports. Check in real-time as you type.
